name: Crafty FTV Stainless Steel Cooling Unit
summary: Crafty FTV Stainless Steel Cooling Unit — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Crafty FTV's Stainless Steel Cooling Unit for the Crafty+ Vaporiser provides the perfect solution for avoiding plastic, offering superior cooling and preserving the flavour of your vapour with its titanium mouthpiece. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
